div1.entryFree: Quip, a sharp jest, a sarcasm: her sudden --s, the least whereof would quell a lover's hope, Gent. IV, 2, 12. no --s now, Pistol, Wiv. I, 3, 45. --s and sentences and these paper bullets of the brain, Ado II, 3, 249. this is called the Q. Modest, As V, 4, 79. in thy --s and thy quiddities, H4A I, 2, 51.
